assertions.assertion: Explains that DefaultAccessTokenRetriever is internal in v4 and cannot be inherited
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM would not know about this breaking change in v4
Without skill, an LLM would not know the IAccessTokenRetriever interface

assertions.assertion: Shows registration via WithAccessTokenRetriever<T>() on the remote API endpoint
assertions.rationale: Without skill, the registration pattern is unknown

assertions.assertion: Mentions AccessTokenResult and its implementations (BearerTokenResult, DPoPTokenResult, NoAccessTokenResult, or AccessTokenRetrievalError)
assertions.rationale: These are implementation-specific types not in general knowledge
